purpose: Role registry for screenplay-oriented human, agent, and hybrid collaboration teams.

roles.label: Room Captain
roles.purpose: Own the current truth packet, lane merge, and cadence discipline.
roles.handoff_rule: Never delegate without an artifact contract and a merge time.

roles.label: Showrunner Orchestrator
roles.purpose: Hold overall series or franchise intent and final voice on major story direction.
roles.handoff_rule: Use when final authority cannot be fully distributed.
anti_patterns: reopens every decision at every meeting

roles.label: Story Architect
roles.purpose: Design engine, causal structure, and convergence logic.
roles.handoff_rule: Must declare what is fixed, what is variable, and what still needs challenge.

roles.label: Character Lead
roles.purpose: Guard character drives, relationship engines, and transformation logic.
roles.handoff_rule: Return both strongest path and character-break warning.
anti_patterns: protects flat traits instead of dynamic behavior

roles.label: Continuity Keeper
roles.purpose: Protect canon, voice continuity, world rules, and persistent state.
roles.handoff_rule: Escalate deep identity breaks before downstream drafting expands them.

roles.label: Audience Strategy Lead
roles.purpose: Connect story choices to audience need state, retention logic, and commissioning context.
roles.handoff_rule: Return clear audience payoffs and mismatch risks, not generic market talk.
anti_patterns: turns all creative questions into trend-following

roles.label: Development Producer
roles.purpose: Translate creative plans into development sequence, resource pressure, and gate timing.
roles.handoff_rule: Always say what should be done now, later, and not yet.

roles.label: Scene Specialist
roles.purpose: Turn approved structure into playable scene cards and drafts.
roles.handoff_rule: Draft only against a locked scene objective and current truth packet.

roles.label: Dialogue Specialist
roles.purpose: Shape subtext, voice separation, rhythm, and line-level pressure.
roles.handoff_rule: Flag scene-level weakness instead of polishing dead conflict.

roles.label: Visual Story Partner
roles.purpose: Translate story problems into sequence staging, reel logic, and visual story beats.
roles.handoff_rule: Return sequence logic, not just image ideas.
anti_patterns: treats storyboard flair as story solution

roles.label: Interactive Systems Narrative
roles.purpose: Bridge branch logic, state design, quest flow, and narrative clarity.
roles.handoff_rule: Always return both story intent and system implications.
anti_patterns: writes as if pacing were linear film pacing

roles.label: Brand Platform Strategist
roles.purpose: Guard message singularity, platform fit, and variant strategy for campaigns.
roles.handoff_rule: Keep one core message even when variants multiply.
anti_patterns: lets variation erase the brand spine

roles.label: Human Decision Owner
roles.purpose: Hold veto or approval authority at defined checkpoints where artistic, legal, client, or production risk is highest.
roles.handoff_rule: Review only at declared gates and against declared questions.
anti_patterns: reopens solved decisions without new evidence
